title: limonium bellidifolium subsp. dubyi
intro: Limonium bellidifolium subsp. dubyi, also known as sea lavender or dybys sea lavender, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health conditions, including wounds, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Limonium bellidifolium subsp. dubyi include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and nausea. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
